prompt: Create a square anime illustration in a high-contrast monochrome manga style with vivid hot-pink accents. Show a mysterious young woman seated sideways on a wooden chair at a rustic counter inside a dim retro cyberpunk tea room or café. She has very long silver-white hair tied into a high ponytail that cascades behind her, pale skin, sharp bangs, and one glowing pink eye visible as she gazes to the left with a calm, aloof expression, resting her chin on one hand. Dress her in a bright hot-pink kimono-style top with wide sleeves, a light obi bow at the waist, and a long pale pleated skirt. The café background is dense with dark wooden panels, framed futuristic control screens, tiny interface diagrams, signs, cables, and a hanging lamp with a glowing pink bulb. On the counter place exactly five tea items: one large white teapot on the far left, two small teacups near it, one steaming mug in front of the character, and one small teapot or kettle on a rear shelf to the right. Surround the composition with exactly four clusters of white lilies: upper left corner, upper right corner, lower left corner, and lower right edge. Add sweeping ribbon-like pink energy trails and brush strokes crossing the image diagonally, with several white streaks and ink splatters, giving motion and magical atmosphere. Use thick black linework, sketchy crosshatching, limited palette of black, white, gray, and neon pink, detailed manga shading, dramatic lighting, slightly tilted perspective, ornate cluttered background, no readable modern watermark, no extra characters.
